use_cases: Triggering form submissions and actions in web applications
Providing clickable CTAs with multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link)
Enabling keyboard-accessible interactions with built-in focus states
Supporting composable patterns via asChild prop for slot-based composition
Adapting to different UI contexts with size variants (default, sm, lg, icon)
ai_summary: A versatile Radix UI-based Button component with class-variance-authority for flexible styling. Supports 6 variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and 4 sizes, with shadow effects, focus-visible outlines, and disabled states. Can be composed using the asChild prop with Radix Slot for advanced composition patterns.
